title: Calpidisca capensis

taxonomy: Calpidisca capensis is a species of siphonophore, a type of marine, colonial organism. The kingdom it belongs to is Animalia, indicating it is an animal. As a member of the phylum Cnidaria, it possesses stinging cells known as cnidocytes. Calpidisca capensis is also classified under the class Hydrozoa, a group of small, freshwater or marine animals. It is further divided into the suborder Siphonophorae, which consists of colonial siphonophores.
